segments.text: This is a $5,000 Rolex and it is covered in vomit. But it was not an accident. A street art group did this on purpose,
creating one of the most famous custom watch face ever. They literally took this luxury watch and logged it inside a glass box filled with house flies. But
flies don't naturally paint. So the artists fed them bright plant-based dyes. And because of how flies digest food, they literally threw it up all
over the watch face, leaving tiny colorful splatters everywhere. So they completely ruined a watch face, right?
Who would buy it now? They named the project Time Flies and instead of selling it to billionaires, they raffled it off for just €3, turning a gross
biological experiment into a genius piece of art. To see more sick designs, subscribe.
